attacking_style: Launches decisive attacks inside final kilometer on uphill finishes, typically waiting for rivals to commit first before unleashing superior finishing power. Prefers short, explosive moves rather than long-range attacks.
team_tactics: Operates with relative independence while teammates probe ahead. Manages own effort strategically rather than relying on heavy team tempo control. Minimal domestique usage in final kilometers.
terrain_preference: Excels on uphill sprint finishes and medium-mountain climbs like Green Mountain. Strong time trial ability converts into climbing strength. Exposed on technical approaches and early positioning battles.
vulnerability: Vulnerable positioning at race starts, evidenced by early crash near climb approach. Weak spatial awareness in nervous opening phases when GC positioning matters.
key_patterns: Waits for opponents to commit before counter-attacking with superior finishing power (2 observations)
Converts time trial strength into climbing wins, managing sustained efforts effectively (2 observations)
Attacks decisively inside final kilometer on categorized climbs, not long-range moves (2 observations)
Demonstrates tactical patience, letting others initiate before responding explosively (2 observations)
Struggles with positioning safety in early race phases and technical sections (2 observations)
form_trajectory: positive: Won stages and defended leader's jersey through strategic attacking. Time trial strength translating effectively to climbing despite positioning vulnerability.
